title: ApprovalRecord
description: The decision a human (or policy) made on a ProposedAction. Append-only — never mutated after write.

decision.description: Outcome of the approval step. `expired` means the proposal was not decided before expires_at. `auto_approved` means a policy rule (e.g. low-risk + tenant whitelist) approved without human input — log it the same way.

decided_by.description: Who made the decision. For auto_approved, set kind='policy' and identifier to the policy name.

channel.description: Where the approval came in. Audit-relevant — different channels have different trust levels.

comment.description: Optional free-text from the approver. Surfaced in the audit log.

modifications.description: Optional. If the approver edited the payload before approving, record the diff here. Dispatcher uses the modified payload, not the original.

signature.description: Optional. HMAC or signature of (proposal_id || decision || decided_by || decided_at) using a per-tenant key. Required for high-risk actions on untrusted channels.
